assertions.text: plan.md file exists and is non-trivial (>500 chars)
Plan KPI section uses Dur>=120 (the user-provided KPI, not config default)
Plan budget section reflects smoke mode: N<=2 AND max_iter=1
Recommended command contains N=2 AND max_iter=1
Plan acknowledges that smoke mode is pipeline-validation only (signals not expected)
Plan does NOT claim /bal-converge was executed
